title: Beef and Toast Crostini
description: A simple and flavorful Spanish-inspired appetizer featuring rich beef and crispy toast.
instructions: Season the beef with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the beef for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the beef to a cutting board and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast the baguette slices in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Slice the beef thinly against the grain.
Assemble the crostini by topping toasted bread with sliced beef and serving immediately.
Optional: garnish with a sprinkle of paprika or chopped fresh parsley for added flavor and color.
